"TicketID", "Submitter", "RequestCategory", "Ticket Name", "Status", "Additional Information", "Support Notes", "Training", "Division", 
"DateTimeReceived", "Modified", "Created", "Attachments", "AttachmentFiles"}),

    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Added Custom",{{"DateReceived", type date}}),
    #"Duplicated Column" = Table.DuplicateColumn(#"Changed Type", "DateReceived", "DateReceived - Copy"),
    #"Split Column by Delimiter" = Table.SplitColumn(Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Duplicated Column", {{"DateReceived - Copy", type text}}, "en-US"), "DateReceived - Copy", Splitter.SplitTextByDelimiter("/", QuoteStyle.Csv), {"DateReceived - Copy.1", "DateReceived - Copy.2", "DateReceived - Copy.3"}),

    #"Renamed Columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Changed Type1",{{"DateReceived - Copy.1", "MONTH"}, {"DateReceived - Copy.2", "DAY"}, {"DateReceived - Copy.3", "YEAR"}}),
    #"Month Name" = Table.AddColumn(#"Renamed Columns", "MonthName", each Date.MonthName(#date(2024, [MONTH], 1)), type text),

in

PW Tickets.expression:
let
    // Function to strip HTML tags
    StripHTML = (inputText as text) as text =>
        let
            chars = Text.ToList(inputText),
            cleaned = List.Generate(
                () => [i = 0, inside = false, result = ""],
                each [i] < List.Count(chars),
                each [
                    i = [i] + 1,
                    inside = if chars{[i]} = "<" then true else if chars{[i]} = ">" then false else [inside],
                    result = if not [inside] and chars{[i]} <> ">" then [result] & chars{[i]} else [result]
                ],
                each [result]
            ){List.Count(chars) - 1}
        in
            cleaned,

    // Load SharePoint source
    Source = SharePoint.Tables("https://usace.dps.mil/sites/TDL-CEMVR-EC-T-ProjectWiseAdmin/", [ApiVersion = 15]),
    #"e749f461-d340-474e-a878-e2f4f54a8a69" = Source{[Id="e749f461-d340-474e-a878-e2f4f54a8a69"]}[Items],

    // Clean up columns
    #"Renamed Columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"e749f461-d340-474e-a878-e2f4f54a8a69",{{"ID", "ID.1"}}),
    #"Removed Columns" = Table.RemoveColumns(#"Renamed Columns", {
        "FileSystemObjectType", "Id", "ServerRedirectedEmbedUri", "ServerRedirectedEmbedUrl", "ContentTypeId", 
        "ID.1", "AuthorId", "EditorId", "OData__UIVersionString", "GUID", "RoleAssignments", 
        "AttachmentFiles", "ContentType", "GetDlpPolicyTip", "FieldValuesAsHtml", "FieldValuesAsText", 
        "FieldValuesForEdit", "File", "Folder", "LikedByInformation", "ParentList", "Properties", 
        "Versions", "Author", "Editor", "OData__ColorTag", "ComplianceAssetId"
    }),
    #"Renamed Columns1" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Removed Columns",{{"Title", "Ticket Name"}}),
    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Renamed Columns1",{{"RequestDate", type datetime}}),
    #"Added Custom" = Table.AddColumn(#"Changed Type", "Requested as Text", each Html.Table([RequestedAssistance], {{"ExtractedText", "body"}}){0}[ExtractedText]),
    Custom1 = Table.AddColumn(
    #"Added Custom",
    "Support as Text",
    each if [SupportHistory] = null or Text.Trim([SupportHistory]) = "" then null
         else Html.Table("<html>" & [SupportHistory] & "</html>", {{"ExtractedText", "body"}}){0}[ExtractedText]
),
    #"Replaced Value" = Table.ReplaceValue(Custom1,"\n","",Replacer.ReplaceText,{"Requested as Text"}),
    #"Reordered Columns" = Table.ReorderColumns(#"Replaced Value",{"TicketID", "Submitter", "RequestCategory", "Ticket Name", "RequestDate", "SupportHistory", "Status", "Requested as Text", "RequestedAssistance", "ConversationID", "Modified", "Created", "Attachments", "FirstUniqueAncestorSecurableObject"}),
    #"Renamed Columns2" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Reordered Columns",{{"Requested as Text", "Additional Information"}, {"Support as Text", "Notes"}, {"RequestDate", "DateReceived"}}),
    #"Removed Columns1" = Table.RemoveColumns(#"Renamed Columns2",{"FirstUniqueAncestorSecurableObject"}),
    #"Changed Type1" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Removed Columns1",{{"Attachments", type logical}, {"Modified", type datetime}, {"Created", type datetime}}),
    #"Removed Columns2" = Table.RemoveColumns(#"Changed Type1",{"SupportHistory", "RequestedAssistance", "ConversationID"}),
    #"Renamed Columns3" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Removed Columns2",{{"Notes", "Support Notes"}}),
    #"Added Custom1" = Table.AddColumn(#"Renamed Columns3", "Source", each "PW"),
    #"Added Custom2" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Custom1", "PBI_UID", each [Source] & "-" & Text.From([TicketID])),
    #"Renamed Columns4" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Added Custom2",{{"DateReceived", "DateTimeReceived"}}),
    #"Lowercased Text" = Table.TransformColumns(#"Renamed Columns4",{{"Submitter", Text.Lower, type text}}),
    #"Merged Queries" = Table.NestedJoin(#"Lowercased Text", {"Submitter"}, EMS_EMPLOYEES, {"EMP_EMAIL_ADDR"}, "EMS_EMPLOYEES", JoinKind.LeftOuter),
    #"Expanded EMS_EMPLOYEES" = Table.ExpandTableColumn(#"Merged Queries", "EMS_EMPLOYEES", {"DIVISION CODE"}, {"DIVISION CODE"}),
    #"Removed Columns3" = Table.RemoveColumns(#"Expanded EMS_EMPLOYEES",{"Division"}),
    #"Renamed Columns5" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Removed Columns3",{{"DIVISION CODE", "Division"}}),
    #"Replaced Errors" = Table.ReplaceErrorValues(#"Renamed Columns5", {{"Additional Information", null}})
in
    #"Replaced Errors"

LastRefresh.expression:
let
    Source = DateTime.LocalNow()-#duration(0,6,0,0),
    #"Converted to Table" = #table(1, {{Source}}),
    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Converted to Table",{{"Column1", type datetime}}),
    #"Renamed Columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Changed Type",{{"Column1", "Last Refresh Date"}})
in
    #"Renamed Columns"

in

EMS_EMPLOYEES.expression:
let
    Source = Odbc.DataSource("dsn=EDW_NTZ_EMS", [HierarchicalNavigation=true]),
    EMS_Database = Source{[Name="EMS",Kind="Database"]}[Data],
    S0CIA123_Schema = EMS_Database{[Name="S0CIA123",Kind="Schema"]}[Data],
    EMS_EMPLOYEES_Table = S0CIA123_Schema{[Name="EMS_EMPLOYEES",Kind="Table"]}[Data],
    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(EMS_EMPLOYEES_Table, each ([EMP_EMAIL_ADDR] <> null) and ([EMP_INACTIVE_IND] = "1")),
    #"Sorted Rows" = Table.Sort(#"Filtered Rows",{{"EMP_NAME", Order.Ascending}}),
    #"Removed Columns" = Table.RemoveColumns(#"Sorted Rows",{"FOA", "EMS_EMP_ID_NO", "EMP_ID_NO", "ORACLE_USER_ID", "ORG_CODE", "POSITION_TITLE", "FULLY_BURDENED_HOUR_RATE", "EMP_INACTIVE_IND", "EMP_TYPE", "OCC_SERIES_CODE", "EMP_NAME", "EMP_LNAME", "EMP_FNAME"}),
    #"Renamed Columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Removed Columns",{{"OFFICE_CODE", "DISTRICT"}}),
    #"Removed Duplicates" = Table.Distinct(#"Renamed Columns"),
    #"Removed Duplicates1" = Table.Distinct(#"Removed Duplicates", {"EMP_EMAIL_ADDR"}),
    #"Lowercased Text" = Table.TransformColumns(#"Removed Duplicates1",{{"EMP_EMAIL_ADDR", Text.Lower, type text}}),
    #"Sorted Rows1" = Table.Sort(#"Lowercased Text",{{"EMP_EMAIL_ADDR", Order.Ascending}}),

    #"Split Column by Delimiter" = Table.SplitColumn(#"Duplicated Column", "BRANCH_CODE - Copy", Splitter.SplitTextByDelimiter("-", QuoteStyle.Csv), {"BRANCH_CODE - Copy.1", "BRANCH_CODE - Copy.2", "BRANCH_CODE - Copy.3"}),

    #"Removed Columns1" = Table.RemoveColumns(#"Changed Type",{"BRANCH_CODE - Copy.1", "BRANCH_CODE - Copy.3"}),

    #"Renamed Columns3" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Added Custom",{{"DIVISION CODE", "DIV"}, {"Div or Dist", "DIVISION CODE"}})
in
